candidates.why: Direct reported top-line revenue and matches Net sales exactly across shown years.
Revenue-like label but explicitly non-GAAP, so less preferred than reported revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the reported revenue line from candidates.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and populated across shown years.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Also a direct cost line, but appears to be an alternate/detailed label rather than the primary reported COGS row.
Also matches the concept, but duplicates the primary COGS amount in shown years.

variables.notes: Used the primary direct cost line rather than alternate duplicate labels.

candidates.why: This appears to be the selling-expense component excluding the separate depreciation and amortisation subrow, so it better fits SG&A excluding D&A.
Administrative expense is a core SG&A component, but this label appears twice and one instance may include D&A while another appears to exclude it.
Potential overhead bucket, but its sublines include write-downs, disposal losses, and restructuring-like items, so it is less clean for SG&A.
Looks like a broader selling-expense total that includes a separate depreciation and amortisation subrow, so less preferred than the punctuated row.

variables.notes: Selling expenses. is preferred because the separate depreciation line suggests this row excludes D&A. Administrative expenses is ambiguous because the exact same row label appears twice, with one instance likely including D&A and another excluding it. Manual review is needed to confirm which duplicate row the system will bind to and to avoid D&A contamination.
No dedicated research and development row is visible in the income statement preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost and should be included in interest expense capture.
Recurring finance-cost bucket and preferable to using total financial expenses when identifiable components exist.
Broader total finance-cost line, but may include FX/non-interest items and should be avoided when granular recurring components exist.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over total Financial expenses to avoid including FX/non-recurring items. This may undercapture years where the direct Interest Expense row is sparse, but it is the cleanest mapping from available candidates.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is required to avoid double counting with MIB.
Would include non-controlling interests, so only a fallback if owner/parent equity were unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-company equity so BE excludes non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line and preferred for MIB.
Equivalent concept, but Non-controlling interests is the more standard balance-sheet label here.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance-sheet non-controlling interest line.
